backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages announcements and roster members using in-memory maps, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both entities with timestamp-based sorting for announcements.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three UI changes to HeroSection.tsx: enlarging/bolding the tournament button text, scaling down the animated boy character, and shrinking the target board SVG elements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Truncated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and recent changes, serving as a human-readable changelog/index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, card, primary, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Legend X Esports PWA, including meta tags for mobile/PWA support, manifest link, favicon references, and service worker registration script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for Legend X Esports defining app name, icons, theme colors, display mode, and categories for installable app behavior.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first with background refresh strategy for GET requests, with offline fallback to index.html for navigation and exclusion of cross-origin and /api/ requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel into the full application layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, and a four-card values grid (Discipline, Excellence, Victory, Brotherhood) with esports styling.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: A collapsible floating admin panel component with tabs for managing roster members and announcements, supporting add/edit/delete operations via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Displays a single announcement card with title, body, formatted timestamp (from nanoseconds), and hover animations including a red accent bar and corner decoration.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, social media links (X, Discord, WhatsApp, YouTube, Instagram), quick navigation links, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section component featuring a looping SVG shooting animation with CSS keyframes depicting a cartoon boy firing at a target, used as a decorative visual element.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background blur, desktop nav links, a 'Visit Website' CTA button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: News section that fetches and displays announcements in a responsive grid using AnnouncementCard, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states handled.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Renders a styled card for a single roster member showing their avatar, name, and role with hover effects and a fallback default avatar.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: Displays a fixed top banner prompting users to install the app as a PWA, handling both the native `beforeinstallprompt` event and iOS Safari fallback with manual instructions.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Fetches and displays the team roster as a grid of PlayerCards, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states handled.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, persisting identity across page reloads using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for CRUD operations on announcements and roster members by calling the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers with custom CSS variables, esports-themed glow effects, and typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the main landing page by rendering Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Legend X Esports frontend, defining dark mode, custom fonts (Bebas Neue, Rajdhani, Inter), an esports-themed color palette using oklch, custom shadows (glow effects), border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for Legend X Esports, recording existing features and pending requests around enlarging tournament button text, resizing the animated boy character, and shrinking target boards in the HeroSection.
